description: ipanema sandals draw inspiration from the culture of the Brazilian city of ipanema. The tropical city's street style is reinterpreted in ipanema footwear - bold prints, vibrant colours and quirky embellishments. A brand with a cause, iPanema collaborated with Gisele Bü ndchen for a climate change project and these products represent their commitment to social-change. Upper Criss crossing forefoot straps with a crystal embellishment Ankle straps looping around the ankle with a buckle Soft footbed Floral print all over the footbed Outsole Single piece PVC moulded, flexible outsole Horizontal lined grooves Sandal care Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
